parameters.query:
SELECT
  p.id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  p.email,
  p.phone,
  p.date_of_birth,
  p.gender,
  p.consent_status,
  p.consent_signed_at,
  p.first_appointment_at,
  p.last_appointment_at,
  p.total_sessions,
  p.created_at,
  EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM demographics     WHERE patient_id = p.id AND is_current = true) AS demographics_complete,
  EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM chief_complaint  WHERE patient_id = p.id AND is_current = true) AS chief_complaint_complete,
  EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM personal_history WHERE patient_id = p.id AND is_current = true) AS personal_history_complete,
  EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM diagnosis        WHERE patient_id = p.id AND is_current = true) AS diagnosis_complete,
  EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM treatment_plan   WHERE patient_id = p.id AND is_current = true) AS treatment_plan_complete
FROM patients p
WHERE p.id = $1::uuid
  AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
LIMIT 1
